# services.walker

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.walker`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.walker.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable walker. |
| `services.walker.enableElephantIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to make Walker's systemd service depend on {option}`services.elephant`. |
| `services.walker.package` | `null or package` | The walker package to use. |
| `services.walker.settings` | `TOML value` | Configuration settings for walker. All the available options can be found here: <https://github.com/abenz1267/walker/blob/master/resources/config.toml> |
| `services.walker.systemd.enable` | `boolean` | Whatever to enable Walker's Systemd Unit. |
| `services.walker.theme` | `null or (submodule)` | The custom theme used by walker. Setting this option overrides `settings.theme`. |
| `services.walker.theme.layout` | `attribute set of (absolute path or strings concatenated with "\n")` | The GTK XML layout used. See the default layout for the correct structure: <https://github.com/abenz1267/walker/tree/master/resources/themes/default> |
| `services.walker.theme.name` | `string` | The theme name. |
| `services.walker.theme.style` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | The styling of the theme, written in GTK CSS. |
